ext_name.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions

ext_description.message: 一个快捷键，找到浏览器里的任何东西。按 ⌘K 同时搜索打开的标签页、书签、历史记录和常用站点。
ext_description.description: Extension description in Chrome Web Store

cmd_open_all.message: 打开所有已配置的 URL

options_manage.description: Link to manage keyboard shortcuts page

options_batchOpenURLs.description: Batch URL list header in options page

options_add.description: Add-URL button label in options page

options_clearAll.description: Clear-all-URLs button label in options page

options_savedUrlsCount.description: Saved URL count, $count$ is a number

options_noUrlsYet.description: First line of empty state in options URL list

options_urlPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the URL input field in options

options_github.description: GitHub repo link label in options footer

options_reportIssue.description: GitHub issue link label in options footer

options_versionLabel.description: Footer version label, $version$ is the manifest version string

overlay_navigate.description: Hint label for arrow keys in overlay

overlay_select.description: Hint label for Enter key in overlay

overlay_close.description: Hint label for Esc key in overlay

overlay_loading.description: Results counter text while search data is loading

overlay_loadError.description: Error shown in overlay when search data fails to load (base message, error detail appended)

overlay_sourceHistory.description: Badge label for history results in overlay

overlay_sourceTopSite.description: Badge label for top-site results in overlay

overlay_sourceBookmark.description: Badge label for bookmark results in overlay

overlay_sourceSearch.description: Badge label for web search option in overlay

overlay_sourceOpen.description: Badge label for open tabs in overlay

overlay_searchDefault.message: 使用默认搜索引擎搜索
overlay_searchDefault.description: Display URL for the web search row in overlay

overlay_untitled.description: Fallback title when a tab/bookmark has no title

notify_noUrls.message: 请先添加 URL 再使用此功能
notify_noUrls.description: Shown when batch-open fires with empty list

notify_openedCount.message: 已成功打开 $count$ 个 URL

notify_openError.message: 打开 URL 时出错，请检查 URL 配置

notify_installedBody.message: 按 $search$ 搜索标签页和书签，按 $batch$ 批量打开 URL。
notify_installedBody.description: Onboarding body, $search$ and $batch$ are keyboard shortcut strings

popup_opening.description: Transient button label while triggering an action

popup_tabError.description: Error when current tab can't be obtained

options_protocolError.description: Validation error on invalid URL protocol

options_urlEmpty.description: Validation error when URL input is empty

options_shortcutNotSet.description: Shown in keyboard shortcut display when a shortcut has not been configured
